title: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report February 24 2022
section_path: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report February 24 2022
section_path_text: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report February 24 2022
summary:
Main
in Chinese iron ore and steelmaking prices 24/02/2022
DCE iron ore futures tight , the main contract closed 703, an increase of 0.43% throughout the day. The spot quotation in the morningalmost kept steady. some traders were active to sell, Some steel procurement more cautious.
